# Analyst Brief Template

Save project-specific copies under `tasks/briefs/`.

Suggested filename:

```text
<type>-<short-kebab-slug>-brief.md
```

Examples:

- `feat-architecture-snapshot-brief.md`
- `fix-auth-context-brief.md`
